name: recall_stig_xlsx_windows_maps_cm6
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. The second real STIG .xlsx file in the BoE that tagged to ZERO — a Windows Server STIG checklist exported to XLSX. Same failure mechanics as recall_stig_xlsx_rhel_maps_cm6: kind=xlsx, no structured stig_findings list, CCI token present in extracted text but never scraped because XLSX is outside _STRUCTURED_FINDING_KINDS, and no uppercase 'CM-6' control-ID string in the body for Tier 3. Maps to CM-6 (Configuration Settings). Result: zero tags today. Distractor AC-2 present as precision guard.

objectives.text: The organization establishes and documents configuration settings for information technology products employed within the information system using security configuration checklists that reflect the most restrictive mode consistent with operational requirements.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Apply a DISA STIG hardening baseline and remediate open findings.

objectives.text: The organization manages information system accounts including establishing, activating, modifying, disabling, and removing accounts.

evidence.title: Windows Server 2022 STIG results export
evidence.text:
Vuln ID	Rule Title	Status	CCI	Severity
V-254238	Windows Server must require a screen lock after 15 minutes	NotAFinding	CCI-000366	medium
V-254265	Windows Server must disable the SMBv1 protocol	NotAFinding	CCI-000366	high
V-254290	Windows Server audit policy must capture logon events	NotAFinding	CCI-000366	medium
V-254441	Windows Server must restrict anonymous SID enumeration	Open	CCI-000366	medium
